page: Microsoft Azure E128nds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Endv6 server family. Powered by an x86_64 Intel processor, this instance provides 128 dedicated virtual CPUs and 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. It operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, ensuring secure and isolated virtualization for demanding enterprise workloads.

The server features integrated local storage with a capacity of 7559 GB and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-throughput disk operations. As a network-optimized instance, it is designed to handle substantial data transfer rates without network bottlenecks. No graphics processing units are included in this configuration, and it does not bundle complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E128nds_v6 offers a high density of memory and local storage relative to its compute allocation, making it a viable option for large-scale deployments that require substantial RAM without the overhead of discrete GPU hardware. This hardware profile is well-suited for memory-intensive applications, large relational databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and big data analytics workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure E128nds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Endv6 server family, featuring 128 dedicated x86_64 Intel vCPUs and 1024.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance delivers a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It is equipped with 7559 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, alongside network optimization for high-throughput data transfers. This configuration does not include GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The E128nds_v6 is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, including large-scale databases, data warehousing, and big data analytics.
